title: Music Delay Reducer
description: This mod lets Minecraft music play more often.
body:
![Music Delay Reducer title](https://i.imgur.com/6mF2rdE.png)

---

The **Music Delay Reducer** Mod was created by [Kyronis](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyronis). This mod lets Minecraft music play more often.

There are some advantages this mod has over other similar mods:
- ⚙️ Easy to configure via a custom options menu
- 🔁 Works on Fabric, Forge and NeoForge
- 🧩 No big dependencies required
- 🔓 Open Source

My mod is also available on CurseForge. [Click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/music-delay-reducer)

[![Instant Gaming banner](https://i.imgur.com/Yvbk2dn.gif)](https://www.instant-gaming.com/?igr=simon28mc)

---

### 📌🌍 Latest versions & Supported languages
A full and always up-to-date version and language list is now available [here](https://kyronis.net/mods/music-delay-reducer) on the official website.

You can help translate Music Delay Reducer! Click [here](https://crowdin.com/project/music-delay-reducer)

### 🔮 Planned functions
- 📖 detailed documentation
